web.title: How can I load an image directly into the Windows clipboard from ...
web.description: To copy an image into the clipboard, use in the script the tool NirCmd with the copyimage action : nircmd.exe clipboard copyimage ...

web.title: BatthewZ Terminal Image Paste - Visual Studio Marketplace
web.description: Paste clipboard images into your VS Code terminal as file paths. Designed for CLI tools like Claude Code that accept image paths as input.

web.title: Paste clipboard image data as a jpeg file in windows directory [closed]
web.description: Press Ctrl + V (or right click -> menu -> Paste clipboard data as image) inside file explorer the clipboard image should be pasted with a default name.

web.title: Command-line method using clipboard to copy multiple images
web.description: After a lot of searching i have only found two possible tools that might do this. The one that seems rated best is called CopyQ.

web.title: How can I paste an image from clipboard directly to a file? [duplicate]
web.description: Anyone know of a way to simply paste a screenshot (taken with PrtScn or Alt+PrtScn) into a Windows Explorer folder and have it be saved as an image.

web.title: How can I copy via Send To from the menu using the clipboard path?
web.description: Right-click on the file, select SendTo and eg: click on the option "Move file/folder to clipboard location" or "Copy file/folder to clipboard location".
